subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-07 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: What is meant is the tree of human life. A person will be held accountable for his unlawful acts--that is, his transgressions and the desires that drove him to commit them
subcodes.first_line_orig: مراد شجرهٴ حیات انسانیست در منهیات یعنی تجاوزات و مشتهیات آن نشان را مسئول میدارد
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @principle of balance; moderation; equilibrium, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @moderation; frugality; simplicity
